name: Glass Storage Canister with wood lid - Extra Small - Threshold™: 24 oz. Glass Jar with Lid, Hand Wash
description:
Preserve your cooking and baking supplies in a beautiful, modern styled Extra-Small Glass Storage Canister with Wood Lid from Threshold™. No need to worry about your tea, herbs or other ingredients going bad when you've got this holder, and you can always see when you're about to run out thanks to the clear glass construction. Its stained wood lid also gives the storage canister a natural, modern aesthetic that you can effortlessly integrate into your kitchen decor.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
